headline: Is Adobe Inc. (ADBE) the Best Beaten Down Technology Stock to Buy Now?
summary: Adobe Inc. (NASDAQ:ADBE) is one of the best beaten-down technology stocks to buy now. On July 2, HSBC upgraded Adobe Inc. (NASDAQ:ADBE) to a Buy from a Hold and raised the price target to $308 from $282. While the stock has shed nearly 38% in market value year to date, the new price target represents […]

headline: Where Oversold Meets Undervalued: 3 Dividend and Growth Plays for Income Investors
summary: Some beaten-down stocks are cheap for a reason, but a select few sit at the rare crossroads of technical washout and genuine undervaluation. Three names across telecom, consumer staples, and software currently occupy that territory, and they are not equally suited for retirement income.

headline: Salesforce Upgraded Its Profit Engine. Quietly
summary: The software giant has quietly transformed its profitability, but investors are still pricing it like the company it used to be.

headline: Congressman Ro Khanna Bought SNDK Below $50 — He Also Bought This Mid-Cap Software Stock Before An OpenAI Deal Sent It Soaring
summary: Khanna has been accumulating Tenable Holdings since last year, way before its shares jumped after its partnership with OpenAI.

headline: Samsung's Blowout Quarter Triggers a Chip Rout, Then Iran Reignites Overnight
summary: Semiconductor stocks got hammered Tuesday after Samsung's record quarter failed to convince investors AI memory demand keeps accelerating, while software names quietly rebounded. Rivian tumbled on a surprise capital raise, Fiserv drew takeover interest, and overnight U.S. strikes on more than 80 Iranian targets pushed oil and gold higher heading into Wednesday's open.
